caption: Restock day: the June botanical run of Driftless Gin from @heartlandspirits_madison lands Saturday. Last rotation sold through in nine days, plan accordingly.
Vendor spotlight: @heartlandspirits_madison has been setting up before sunrise on the Square all season. Ten years of Madison-made spirits this fall.
Our house old fashioned starts with bourbon from @heartlandspirits_madison, two blocks away. It has been on the menu since 2019 and it is not going anywhere.
Wisconsin distillery profile #14: @heartlandspirits_madison. Four-year bourbon, a rye that deserves more attention, and a rice spirit project we are very curious about.
Patio season openers on Willy Street: @heartlandspirits_madison opens theirs this weekend with tasting flights and one of the better zero-proof programs in town.
New on the back bar: Heartland Rye batch 31 from @heartlandspirits_madison. Ask for it in a sazerac, thank us later.
Workshop recap: our koji is fermenting in some interesting places these days, including the rice spirit project at @heartlandspirits_madison. Patience-based collaborations are the best kind.
May meetup recap: gin tasting flight at @heartlandspirits_madison. The rhubarb botanical rotation was the group favorite by a wide margin.
Good week of Wisconsin distillery visits. Swapped notes on grain costs and barrel programs with the crew at @heartlandspirits_madison. This state's craft scene looks out for each other.
Venue scouting: the barrel room at @heartlandspirits_madison hosts private events for up to 60. Our couples keep asking for it.
ICYMI: @heartlandspirits_madison turns ten on October 17. Founder Jacob Graves told us the party will take over the block. Story link in bio.
Wisconsin old fashioned week continues. Tonight's pour: Heartland Bourbon from @heartlandspirits_madison with brandied cherries.
Local spirits list refresh: bourbon and rye from @heartlandspirits_madison now pouring at the bar. Capitol view, Madison whiskey.
Midwest distiller road trip, stop three: @heartlandspirits_madison. Talked rye mash bills and koji for two hours. Madison, you are lucky to have these folks.
Spring allocation of the bottle club rye from @heartlandspirits_madison is members-only, but the standard rye on our shelf is the same backbone. Highly recommended.
The koji and rice spirit work happening at @heartlandspirits_madison might be the most interesting R&D in Wisconsin distilling right now. Full write-up on the blog.
Spent the afternoon thieving barrels at @heartlandspirits_madison for our single barrel pick. Spirited arguments were had. Our barrel lands in April.
Winter pairing menu features a Cask Strength Bourbon from @heartlandspirits_madison alongside the duck. Limited bottles, limited duck.
Maker feature: ten years ago @heartlandspirits_madison started with one still on Williamson Street. The barrel-stave art in their tasting room is made from their own retired cooperage.
Holiday cocktail menu is live. The toddy uses Heartland Bourbon from @heartlandspirits_madison and we are not taking notes on substitutions.
Thank you to @heartlandspirits_madison for donating a private tasting package to our winter fundraiser auction. Local businesses showing up for Dane County, as always.
